string EntryAbility_desc 0x01000009
string EntryAbility_label 0x0100000a
string app_name 0x01000000
string module_desc 0x0100000b
color color_absent 0x01000004
color color_correct 0x01000005
color color_misplaced 0x01000006
color start_window_background 0x01000007
media app_icon 0x01000002
media icon 0x01000003
media media 0x01000001
profile main_pages 0x01000008
